content.en:
"It's hard to find such a life magnetic beast!"

Ye Tian frowned slightly.

After all, there are too few Life Magnetic Beasts, just like although there are Life Magnetic Beasts in the Nine-Story Building, they will definitely be vigorously cultivated.

As a result, many Life Magnetic Beasts are in the realm above the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor.

And the Life Magnetic Beast that surpassed the Sevenfold Ancestor, he couldn't replicate it.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to inquire about the specific information about the Life Magnetic Beast.

Finally, Ye Tian found a half-step sevenfold ancestral life magnetic beast, but that life magnetic beast was not in the Ninth Building, but in the hands of another force.

"Ten Mountains!"

This is a force second only to the Nine-Fold Building, not too much weaker than the Nine-Fold Building, with a lot of Nine-Fold Ancestors and half-step Nine-Fold Ancestors, but the number of Dao Ancestors is much less than that of the Nine-Fold Building.

And the Dao Ancestor who has a half-step sevenfold ancestor life magnetic beast is a sevenfold ancestor of the Ten Dao Mountains, this is also a very powerful sevenfold ancestor, and he is also a descendant of a half-step ninefold ancestor, and his identity is not ordinary.

And the other party put the half-step sevenfold ancestor-level life magnetic beast in a special place to cultivate, after all, it is very difficult for the life magnetic beast to grow, and it also needs a large amount of life matter.

And Ye Tian also found out where the Life Magnetic Beast was located through the Nine-Story Building, and he only needed to sneak in.

"Green Forest!"

This is a treasure land controlled by the Ten Dao Mountains, and the Life Magnetic Beast is placed in a place in the Green Forest Realm, and it is guarded by several Sevenfold Peak Ancestors and a half-step Eightfold Ancestor, all of whom are the servants of that Dao Ancestor.

For Ye Tian, the most difficult thing is to enter the green forest realm.

If you are not a member of the Ten Mountains, you may not be able to enter the Green Forest Realm.

And as a member of the Nine-Story Building, he had a hostile relationship with the Ten Dao Mountains, so it was impossible for the Ten Dao Mountains to let him enter the Green Forest Realm.

"There is only one way, disguise yourself as a Dao Ancestor of the Ten Dao Mountains and infiltrate the Green Forest Realm, even if they find out later, it will be too late!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, Ye Tian spent the next few years constantly spying on the green forest world to find opportunities.

Finally on this day, Ye Tian found a suitable opportunity.

"The Dao Ancestor of the Ten Dao Mountains often enters the Green Forest, and recently went to a very distant regional boundary, I can copy his identity and directly enter the Green Forest Realm!"

Ye Tian felt that this kind of infiltration was difficult to detect, after all, the Ten Dao Mountains were different from the Nine Buildings, a place like the Green Forest Realm required contribution points for ordinary Dao Ancestors, but for Dao Ancestors with high status, it was free to enter.

It's like the Dao Ancestor, who is a half-step sevenfold ancestor whose life level has reached 8 or more, and his status in the Ten Dao Mountains is not low, so he has the treatment of entering the green forest realm for free.

Otherwise, if you need to contribute points, you have to deduct the contribution points before you can enter the Green Forest Realm, and Ye Tian does not have the contribution value of the Ten Dao Mountains, so he really wants to become a Dao Ancestor, and he can't enter the Green Forest Realm, and he will be easily discovered.

......

Greenery.

On this day, Ye Tian came here, turned into a copy of the body of the Dao Ancestor, and came to the entrance of the Green Forest Realm as the Dao Ancestor.

Really.

Dao Ancestor was not hindered in any way, but only symbolically used an Primordial Ancient Treasure to probe Ye Tian's body and confirm Ye Tian's identity.

And the copy of the body will not be easily detected The authenticity of the identity may be seen by the half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor or the Ninefold Origin Ancestor, but the Dao Ancestor stationed at these entrances will definitely not be able to see it.

In this way, Ye Tian easily entered the green forest realm.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to look for the Life Magnetic Beast.

It took a little time for Ye Tian's copying talent to sense the location of the Life Magnetic Beast, he didn't get close to the Life Magnetic Beast, and left soon after.

After all, he only needed to sense the Life Magnetic Beast to copy its body, and that was enough!

After Ye Tian left, those Dao Ancestors who were in charge of guarding the town were a little puzzled, and they didn't understand why Dao Ancestors suddenly left again when they entered the Green Forest Realm?

Of course, they didn't probe anything.

......

"Hahaha, I entered the Green Forest Realm and left as a Dao Ancestor, I'm afraid they will never know!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, Ye Tian began to copy the body of the Life Magnetic Beast.

Soon, a half-step sevenfold ancestor-level life magnetic beast was successfully copied by Ye Tian.

Of course.

Ye Tian did not copy the Life Magnetic Beast in the Nine-Story Building, but copied it in the Primeval Origin Boundary.

Otherwise, he didn't know how to explain it if he was found in the nine-story building.

"Now it's time to try the effects of the Life Magnet!"

Ye Tian's life magnetic beast body began to urge the power of the origin, releasing a strange wave acting on Ye Tian's body.

Airplanes!!!

Ye Tian's life level was increasing at a very good rate.

"It works!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

Even if this replica body is scrapped, he can continue to reproduce it!

In other words, he is equivalent to possessing a large number of life magnetic beasts!

Of course, he also knew very well that the effect of the Life Magnetic Beast would be lost sooner or later, but he could improve as much as he could.

He doesn't know what it costs to raise his life level to 9.9, but if he can increase it by 0.1, he will increase it by 0.1, and he will do whatever it takes!

As the years passed, Ye Tian's life level continued to improve, and the life magnetic beast's body became weaker and weaker, after all, this body was consuming the origin all the time, burning life power.

this day.

The Life Magnet body collapsed, and it was an irreversible collapse.

"Let's test the life level!"

Subsequently, Ye Tian tested it.

As a result, his life level was still at 9, and he was not raised to 9.1 life level.

"I feel that my life level has improved a lot, but I didn't expect it to be 9,1, if it is raised to 9.9, it will be too difficult!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

And he spent a life magnetic beast, if he was replaced by other Dao Ancestors, how would he dare to pay such a price!

Of course, the Sevenfold Ancestor-level Life Magnet Beast or the Eightfold Ancestor-level Life Magnet Beast would definitely be many times more effective.

However, the life magnet beast is too difficult to ascend to the Eightfold Primordial Ancestor, and the price paid is many times more difficult than cultivating an Eightfold Primordial Ancestor.

As a result, most of the Life Magnets were at the Sevenfold Origin Level.

But even if it was a sevenfold ancestor-level life magnetic beast, it was at most comparable to dozens of half-step sevenfold ancestor-level life magnetic beasts, and it was impossible to increase much of its life level.

Therefore, even if other Dao Ancestors collected all the Life Magnetic Beasts, it would be difficult for them to raise their life level to 9.9!

"Continue to copy the Life Magnetic Beast and strive to raise the life level to 9.5 or above, this is the minimum requirement!"

In the following years, Ye Tian copied the Life Magnet Beast again and again, and constantly used the Life Magnet Beast to improve his Life Magnet Beast.

And just like that, the long years passed!
